github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Japanese with a condense and simplified description for commit generation. Focus on key changes and avoid unnecessary details. Abiding the Semantic Commit Messages Standard, such as 'feat:', 'fix:', 'docs:', 'style:', 'refactor:', 'test:', 'chore:', 'format:', 'perf:', 'ci:', 'build:'.
